notes: This inventory reflects tools present in the repo, including feature-gated and environment-gated tools.
Some tools are only active when specific feature flags, env vars, or user types are enabled.
MCP tools are dynamic at runtime and are not exhaustively enumerable from the repo alone.

core_tools.name: AgentTool
core_tools.description: Spawn a sub-agent to handle a delegated task.

core_tools.name: AskUserQuestionTool
core_tools.description: Ask the user a structured multiple-choice question.

core_tools.name: PowerShellTool
core_tools.gating: enabled when PowerShell tool support is available

core_tools.name: FileReadTool
core_tools.description: Read files, images, PDFs, and notebooks.

core_tools.name: GlobTool
core_tools.description: Find files by glob or wildcard pattern.
core_tools.gating: present unless embedded search tools replace it

core_tools.name: GrepTool
core_tools.gating: present unless embedded search tools replace it

core_tools.name: ToolSearchTool
core_tools.description: Search the available tool catalog when deferred tool loading is enabled.
core_tools.gating: enabled when tool search is optimistic/enabled

core_tools.name: BriefTool
core_tools.description: Produce a brief or condensed response.

core_tools.name: SendMessageTool
core_tools.description: Send a message to another teammate or agent context.

core_tools.name: ListMcpResourcesTool
core_tools.description: List resources exposed by connected MCP servers.

task_and_worktree_tools.name: TaskCreateTool
task_and_worktree_tools.gating: enabled when Todo v2 is enabled

task_and_worktree_tools.name: TaskGetTool
task_and_worktree_tools.gating: enabled when Todo v2 is enabled

task_and_worktree_tools.name: TaskUpdateTool
task_and_worktree_tools.gating: enabled when Todo v2 is enabled

task_and_worktree_tools.name: TaskListTool
task_and_worktree_tools.gating: enabled when Todo v2 is enabled

task_and_worktree_tools.name: EnterWorktreeTool
task_and_worktree_tools.gating: enabled when worktree mode is enabled

task_and_worktree_tools.name: ExitWorktreeTool
task_and_worktree_tools.gating: enabled when worktree mode is enabled

optional_or_feature_gated_tools.name: SyntheticOutputTool
optional_or_feature_gated_tools.description: Return the final response as structured JSON.

optional_or_feature_gated_tools.name: TeamCreateTool
optional_or_feature_gated_tools.description: Create an agent team or swarm.
optional_or_feature_gated_tools.gating: enabled when agent swarms are enabled

optional_or_feature_gated_tools.name: TeamDeleteTool
optional_or_feature_gated_tools.description: Remove an agent team or swarm.
optional_or_feature_gated_tools.gating: enabled when agent swarms are enabled

optional_or_feature_gated_tools.name: SleepTool
optional_or_feature_gated_tools.description: Pause or wait for scheduled continuation.

optional_or_feature_gated_tools.name: WebBrowserTool
optional_or_feature_gated_tools.description: Browser automation or browser session tool.

optional_or_feature_gated_tools.name: MonitorTool
optional_or_feature_gated_tools.description: Monitor a running target, process, or workflow.

optional_or_feature_gated_tools.name: SendUserFileTool
optional_or_feature_gated_tools.description: Send or provide a file back to the user.

dynamic_tools.name: MCPTool
dynamic_tools.description: Generic wrapper for arbitrary MCP server tools.
dynamic_tools.gating: runtime, depends on connected MCP servers

dynamic_tools.name: McpAuthTool
dynamic_tools.gating: runtime, depends on MCP auth flow
